name: Smothered Flank Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds beef flank or round steak
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6
With a sharp knife, score the meat about 1/8 inch deep on the top side of the flank steak.
Season with salt and pepper. Rub in Worcestershire sauce and oil. Sprinkle with paprika.
Place sliced onions and mushrooms in the Crock-Pot. Roll the flank steak if necessary to fit easily, and place it on top of the onions. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
Remove the steak to a warm carving platter and cut across the grain into thin diagonal slices. Serve with onions and mushrooms, pouring the unthickened gravy over all. Sprinkle with parsley.
